chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The sneezing and the Naming (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/556)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/556)
text: عَطَسَ غُلَامٌ لَمْ يَبْلُغِ الْحُلُمَ عِنْدَ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بَارَكَ اللَّهُ فِيكَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, or someone else, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> having said: ‘A boy who had yet to reach puberty, sneezed in the presence of the Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>, and he said, ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>’. So the Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> said to him: ‘May Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Place Blessings in you’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from his father from al- Nawfali from al-Sakuni from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “A young boy who had not yet reached puberty once sneezed in the presence of the Holy Prophet and said, ‘All praise belongs to Allah.’ The Holy Prophet said, ‘May Allah place blessings in you.’”
